topStories.title: Retail investing has surged in India, but rural participation remains low, says Sebi Chief Tuhin Kanta Pandey
topStories.summary: India's securities markets have seen substantial growth.  Retail investor numbers have surged, and market capitalization has climbed significantly.  However, actual investment participation lags behind awareness.  SEBI is enhancing investor protection and launching initiatives to boost financial literacy.  Disciplined long-term investing is encouraged for financial empowerment.

topStories.title: India’s earnings growth to slow down in next 12-18 months, warns Moody’s Ratings. Here’s why
topStories.summary: Moody’s Ratings warns that India’s corporate earnings growth may slow over the next 12–18 months due to rising input costs, rupee depreciation, supply-chain disruptions, and labour market uncertainty. The agency also flagged weaker consumption, delayed investments, and sectoral pressures across autos, airlines, metals, and oil marketing companies amid global risks.

india.title: Geffen Gift Reshapes Access: Yale Drama scraps tuition with $150m; graduates gain real freedom
india.summary: Yale's David Geffen School of Drama removed tuition fees with a $150 million donation. This move opened doors for talented students previously excluded by financial barriers. The initiative aims to democratize the theatre industry by fostering a more diverse talent pool. Graduates can now pursue their artistic passions without immediate financial burdens, enriching the entire creative landscape.

india.title: $1 Billion Gift Reshapes School: Ruth Gottesman makes Einstein tuition-free; future doctors gain new options
india.summary: A remarkable $1 billion donation has made Albert Einstein College of Medicine tuition-free for all students, a historic first for U.S. medical schools. This generous gift, from long-time supporter Ruth Gottesman, aims to alleviate student debt and invest in the Bronx community. The move is expected to attract diverse talent and reshape the future of medical education.

business.title: Mangalam Worldwide’s board approves 1:10 stock split as smallcap rises 120% in a year
business.summary: Mangalam Worldwide has approved a 1:10 stock split, under which each equity share with a face value of Rs 10 will be subdivided into 10 shares of Re 1 each, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The decision was cleared by the board on May 15, 2026.

business.title: Retail investing has surged in India, but rural participation remains low, says Sebi Chief Tuhin Kanta Pandey
business.summary: India's securities markets have seen substantial growth.  Retail investor numbers have surged, and market capitalization has climbed significantly.  However, actual investment participation lags behind awareness.  SEBI is enhancing investor protection and launching initiatives to boost financial literacy.  Disciplined long-term investing is encouraged for financial empowerment.

business.title: India’s earnings growth to slow down in next 12-18 months, warns Moody’s Ratings. Here’s why
business.summary: Moody’s Ratings warns that India’s corporate earnings growth may slow over the next 12–18 months due to rising input costs, rupee depreciation, supply-chain disruptions, and labour market uncertainty. The agency also flagged weaker consumption, delayed investments, and sectoral pressures across autos, airlines, metals, and oil marketing companies amid global risks.

business.summary: Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar administered the oath of office to Satheesan at a grand ceremony held at the Central Stadium in Thiruvananthapuram. A 20-member Cabinet was also sworn in alongside the new Chief Minister.

business.title: New Kerala government confronts fiscal crisis and rising welfare burden

business.title: German 10-year bond yield stays at 15-year high amid global bond rout
business.summary: Global bond markets are experiencing significant losses as rising energy prices, fueled by the Iran conflict, ignite inflation fears. Investors now anticipate central banks worldwide, including the US Federal Reserve and European Central Bank, to hike interest rates. Japan's government debt issuance further strains finances, pushing JGB yields to record highs, while Eurozone yields also climb.

business.title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit 2026: Decoding the future of Indian stock market in uncertain times
business.summary: Indian investors navigate a complex wealth creation landscape. Geopolitical shifts and rapid AI adoption demand new strategies. The ET Alpha Wealth Summit 2026 on June 4 in Mumbai will gather top minds. Discussions will focus on AI, private markets, and global capital flows. Learn how to build resilient portfolios and identify future opportunities.

business.title: Commodity Radar: Rupee's record lows support gold prices. Can fresh base formation trigger upside?
business.summary: Gold futures on MCX are holding above key support levels as rupee weakness nears record lows, boosting domestic prices despite global softness. Analysts say MCX gold is showing early signs of base formation, with consolidation above Rs 1.58 lakh potentially paving the way for further upside if momentum sustains.

business.title: Gold loan giant Muthoot FinCorp plans Rs 4,000 crore IPO. Check details
business.summary: Muthoot FinCorp has approved plans to raise up to Rs 4,000 crore via an IPO, aiming to fund expansion in the fast-growing gold loan market. The company, fully owned by its promoter family, plans a fresh issue of shares as strong gold prices and demand boost sector growth prospects.

entertainment.title: Keerthy Suresh slams rumours of surgeries and addresses body-shaming comments: ‘When you are plump, they want you fit’
entertainment.summary: Admitting that she recently had a physical and mental setback, Keerthy Suresh got candid about being body shamed throughout her career.

entertainment.title: TN CM Vijay, Khushbu Sundar saddened by K Rajan's sudden death at 85; honour his contribution to film industry
entertainment.summary: Filmmaker K Rajan died of suicide at the age of 85 on Sunday. The Tamil film industry condoles his death.

entertainment.title: Maniesh Paul surprises Farah Khan as he reveals he worked as announcer in Delhi malls: ‘Buy one shirt, get one free’
entertainment.summary: Maniesh Paul showcased his spacious new home to Farah Khan, sharing his preference for open spaces. He recalled his humble beginnings in Delhi.

entertainment.title: Why is Arjun Kapoor being trolled for Saurabh Dwivedi's acting experiment in Kartavya?
entertainment.summary: While Kartavya may have been a one-off creative exploration for journalist-turned-actor Saurabh Dwivedi, acting is a full-fledged career for Arjun Kapoor.

entertainment.title: Fawad Khan and wife Sadaf beam with pride at their son Ayaan’s graduation ceremony. See photo
entertainment.summary: Fawad Khan's family photo at his son Ayaan's graduation has become a social media sensation.

entertainment.title: Liked ‘Worst Ex Ever’ Season 2? What to know about Wade Wilson AKA Deadpool Killer and his current whereabouts
entertainment.summary: Another season of ‘Worst Ex Ever’ is streaming on Netflix. The first episode is about Wade Wilson, known as the Deadpool Killer, who killed two women in 2019.

entertainment.title: Riteish Deshmukh's Raja Shivaji beats Sairat's lifetime haul, becomes highest-grossing Marathi film ever
entertainment.summary: Ritesh Deshmukh's historical drama, Raja Shivaji has earned  ₹93.00 crore nett in India and  ₹114.80 crore gross worldwide.
